title: Dangote, Gates Relaunch Africa Center’s Capital Campaign - FinancialEDGE
description: Aliko Dangote, President and Chief Executive of Dangote Industries Limited, joined forces with Bill Gates, Co-Chair of the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation, to relaunch the Capital Campaign for the Africa Center in New York City. The event, held on September 25, 2024, brought together influential figures, including Mohammed Indimi, Fatima Aliko Dangote, Laurie Cumbo,
html:
Aliko Dangote, President and Chief Executive of Dangote Industries Limited, joined forces with Bill Gates, Co-Chair of the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation, to relaunch the Capital Campaign for the Africa Center in New York City.

The event, held on September 25, 2024, brought together influential figures, including Mohammed Indimi, Fatima Aliko Dangote, Laurie Cumbo, and Benedict Oramah.  This initiative aims to promote African culture, business, and innovation.
